name: Jerome Richardson
abstract: Jerome Richardson (November 15, 1920 – June 23, 2000) was an American jazz musician and woodwind player. He is cited as playing one of the earliest jazz flute recordings with his work on the 1949 Quincy Jones arranged song "Kingfish".

interviews.title: Jerome Richardson interviewed by Monk Rowe, New York City, New York, March 9, 1996

about_quotes.speaker: Joe Temperley
about_quotes.evidence: The saxophone section was Jerome Richardson and Jerry Dodgion and Joe Farrell and Eddie Daniels and myself.
about_quotes.doc_title: Joe Temperley interviewed by Monk Rowe, Aspen, Colorado, October 11, 1997

about_quotes.speaker: George P. Fleming
about_quotes.evidence: I also played with Jerome Richardson... And I have a picture of he and I at a jam session together.

about_quotes.speaker: Jones Hank
about_quotes.evidence: I worked there with a group with Jerome Richardson, Wendell Marshall, and Shadow Wilson.
about_quotes.doc_title: Jones Hank — Smithsonian Jazz Oral History

about_quotes.speaker: Jerry Dodgion
about_quotes.evidence: I knew Jerome Richardson from San Francisco and we had played together in Gerald Wilson’s band there. And so when I came to New York he encouraged me to come and everything and he helped me a great deal.
about_quotes.doc_title: Jerry Dodgion interviewed by Monk Rowe, New York City, New York, March 9, 1996

about_quotes.speaker: Gap Mangione
about_quotes.evidence: That band consisted of ... Jerome Richardson ... Great players. And of course, the thing that I love so much is the kind of respect that they show. ... we walked in there as kids with those guys.
about_quotes.doc_title: Gap Mangione interviewed by Monk Rowe, Rochester, New York, January 11, 2012

about_quotes.speaker: Loren Schoenberg
about_quotes.evidence: I was involved with something called the American Jazz Orchestra... And this was a band comprised of mostly big band veterans: ... Jerome Richardson
about_quotes.doc_title: Loren Schoenberg interviewed by Monk Rowe, New York City, New York, January 14, 2019
